body.title: Layer 3 brick: HYPOTHESIZE engram
body.result: All 8 Layer 3 TEMPLATE nodes seeded with full tests (1305 passing). Session 2026-04-01h.
body.description: Design and seed HYPOTHESIZE as a TEMPLATE Memory node. Given delta (from OBSERVE) and TWM context (from SITUATE), forms a candidate causal explanation for what went wrong. Emits hypothesis and hypothesis_confidence to basket. Core of the debug loop: OBSERVE → HYPOTHESIZE → CONSTRAIN → REPLAN. Abductive reasoning brick — how might that work? Layer 3 cognitive stdlib (D297).
